gt_sql: SELECT T2.CreaionDate FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.Age IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.Age, T2.CreaionDate LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p.CreaionDate
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE u.Age IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY u.Age ASC, p.CreaionDate ASC
LIMIT 1
question: What is the date when the youngest user made his or her first post?
